languages.text: "Запрос на сопровождение принят. Допустимый ответ найден, внемлите. Запрос не может быть удовлетворен. Все суда Эксплораторского флота Осознание призваны на стратегический объект Ефрат-II. Прошение может быть рассмотрено после завершения операции на объекте. Озвучьте ваш запрос. Слава {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "Запрос на сопровождение принят. Допустимый ответ найден, внемлите. Запрос не может быть удовлетворен. Слава {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g}".
traits.speaker: FootfallVendorServitor

languages.text: "Request for escort received. Valid response found. Attention: request cannot be processed. All vessels of the Explorator Cognisance Fleet have been called to strategic location Eufrates II. The request may be considered after operations at the location have been completed. State your request. Glory to the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."

languages.text: «Solicitud de escolta recibida. Respuesta válida procesada. Atención: esta petición no se puede procesar. Todas las naves de la Flota Exploradora Conciencia han sido asignadas a la posición estratégica Eufrates II. La solicitud podrá ser considerada una vez terminen las operaciones en el lugar. Indique su petición. Gloria al {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}».
languages.original_text: "Request for escort received. Valid response found. Attention: request cannot be processed. All vessels of the Explorator Cognisance Fleet have been called to strategic location Eufrates II. The request may be considered after operations at the location have been completed. State your request. Glory to the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."

traits.locale_text: «Solicitud de escolta recibida. Respuesta válida procesada. Atención: esta petición no se puede procesar. Todas las naves de la Flota Exploradora Conciencia han sido asignadas a la posición estratégica Eufrates II. La solicitud podrá ser considerada una vez terminen las operaciones en el lugar. Indique su petición. Gloria al {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}».

languages.text: “收到护送请求。已检索到有效响应。注意：请求无法处理。真理开拓者舰队的所有舰船均已被召集至战略坐标：欧夫拉茨二号星。该处坐标的行动结束后，将重新审议此次请求。请陈述您的请求。荣耀归于{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼塞亚{/g}。”
languages.original_text: "Request for escort received. Valid response found. Attention: request cannot be processed. All vessels of the Explorator Cognisance Fleet have been called to strategic location Eufrates II. The request may be considered after operations at the location have been completed. State your request. Glory to the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."

traits.locale_text: “收到护送请求。已检索到有效响应。注意：请求无法处理。真理开拓者舰队的所有舰船均已被召集至战略坐标：欧夫拉茨二号星。该处坐标的行动结束后，将重新审议此次请求。请陈述您的请求。荣耀归于{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼塞亚{/g}。”

languages.text: « Demande d'escorte reçue. Réponse valide trouvée. Attention : cette requête ne peut pas être traitée. Tous les vaisseaux de la Flotte de la Connaissance des Explorators ont reçu l'ordre de se rendre sur le site stratégique d'Euphrate-II. La requête sera envisageable une fois l'opération terminée. Énoncez votre demande. Gloire à {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}l'Omnimessie{/g}. »
languages.original_text: "Request for escort received. Valid response found. Attention: request cannot be processed. All vessels of the Explorator Cognisance Fleet have been called to strategic location Eufrates II. The request may be considered after operations at the location have been completed. State your request. Glory to the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."

traits.locale_text: « Demande d'escorte reçue. Réponse valide trouvée. Attention : cette requête ne peut pas être traitée. Tous les vaisseaux de la Flotte de la Connaissance des Explorators ont reçu l'ordre de se rendre sur le site stratégique d'Euphrate-II. La requête sera envisageable une fois l'opération terminée. languages.text: "Refakat talebi alındı. Geçerli yanıt bulundu. Dikkat: Talep işleme alınamıyor. Keşiftör Malumat Filosu'nun tüm gemileri, Eufrates II stratejik konumuna çağrıldı. Talep, söz konusu konumdaki operasyonlar tamamlandıktan sonra değerlendirilebilir. Talebinizi belirtin. {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih{/g} yolumuzu açık etsin."
languages.original_text: "Request for escort received. Valid response found. Attention: request cannot be processed. All vessels of the Explorator Cognisance Fleet have been called to strategic location Eufrates II. The request may be considered after operations at the location have been completed. State your request. Glory to the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Refakat talebi alındı. Geçerli yanıt bulundu. Dikkat: Talep işleme alınamıyor. Keşiftör Malumat Filosu'nun tüm gemileri, Eufrates II stratejik konumuna çağrıldı. Talep, söz konusu konumdaki operasyonlar tamamlandıktan sonra değerlendirilebilir. Talebinizi belirtin. {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih{/g} yolumuzu açık etsin."

languages.text: "Anfrage nach freiem Geleit erhalten. Gültige Antwort gefunden. Achtung: Verarbeitung der Anfrage nicht möglich. Alle Schiffe der Explorator-Flotte 'Erkenntnis' wurden zur strategischen Position Eufrates II beordert. Die Anfrage wird nach dem Abschluss aller dortigen Operationen erneut geprüft. Erwarte Eingabe. Ruhm dem {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."
languages.original_text: "Request for escort received. Valid response found. Attention: request cannot be processed. State your request. Glory to the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Anfrage nach freiem Geleit erhalten. Gültige Antwort gefunden. Achtung: Verarbeitung der Anfrage nicht möglich. Ruhm dem {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}."

languages.text: "護衛要請を受けた。有効な応答が見つかりました。注意：要求は処理できません。探検家コグニサンス艦隊の全艦隊は、戦略拠点ユーフラテスIIに招集されている。この要請は、その場所での作戦が完了した後に検討されるかもしれません。要求を述べよ。"全能の神に栄光あれ"
